name: An Auditable Policy-Simulation Framework for Student Dropout in Intervention-Free Data
summary: arXiv:2604.08874v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: This study proposes a temporal modeling framework with a counterfactual policy-simulation layer for student dropout in higher education, us...
description: arXiv:2604.08874v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: This study proposes a temporal modeling framework with a counterfactual policy-simulation layer for student dropout in higher education, using LMS engagement data and administrative withdrawal records. Dropout is operationalized as a time-to-event outcome at the enrollment level; weekly risk is modeled in discrete time via penalized, cla...
author: Rafael da Silva, Jeff Eicher, Gregory Longo
